## Meeting Purpose

[Peer interview with Dan Liubovich for the Chief of Staff role.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Zipline Pricing Project:** Dan led a company-wide pricing overhaul to support upmarket expansion and new product launches. The new model is now the standard for all deals, enabling a land-and-expand motion.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**AI-Native Productivity:** Dan built a critical internal pricing calculator using AI (Gemini, Claude) with no prior web dev experience, demonstrating a strong ability to leverage new tools for rapid, high-impact results.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [**Motivation for GrowthX:** Seeks the scrappier, ambiguous environment of an earlier-stage startup to solve foundational problems from scratch, a contrast to Zipline's current focus on refining existing systems.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**GrowthX CEO's Focus:** Marcel (CEO) focuses on vision, sales (closing major deals, saving at-risk accounts), and setting the bar for excellence in key functions like client onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Topics

### Background & Zipline Experience

  - [**Experience:** 4+ years at McKinsey (ops strategy) → 1+ year at Zipline (Biz Ops).](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [**Zipline Role:** Biz Ops (similar to Chief of Staff), focused on special projects.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Key Project: Pricing Model Overhaul**](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Problem:** Zipline's simple pricing model (e.g., per-user) failed to support upmarket expansion and new product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a robust, flexible model to handle market nuance while remaining simple for standard deals.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
          - [**Internal:** Collaborated with Sales and Product to define guardrails and map pricing curves to historical deal data.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - [**External:** Researched competitor pricing and market norms (e.g., for a new contracting module).](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
          - [**Validation:** Pressure-tested concepts with advisory board customers to refine objection handling.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The new model is the standard for all deals (Q3/Q4 revenue), enabling a land-and-expand motion for large accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### AI-Native Productivity

  - [**Dan's AI Use:**](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Research:** Used Gemini and Perplexity for rapid, first-principles research, cross-referencing AI outputs with manual findings.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [**Development:** Built an interactive web-based pricing calculator using AI (Gemini, Claude) in a chat window, with no prior web dev experience.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
          - [**Impact:** The tool is more effective than the company's CPQ and is being explored for automating SoW creation and Salesforce updates.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [**George's AI Use (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Built an ICP scoring tool for sales to objectively qualify leads based on 5+ matrices, replacing anecdotal feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Impact:** Enables objective pipeline discussions and scalable, adaptable qualification criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Motivation for GrowthX

  - [**Core Driver:** Seeks more foundational, ambiguous problems to solve from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Contrast:** Zipline's current focus is on refining existing systems, whereas Dan wants to build them.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [**Analogy:** Seeks a company at Zipline's stage \~2 years ago, where he can have maximum impact.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)

### GrowthX Culture & CEO's Focus

  - [**Culture:**](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
      - [High-impact environment with no hierarchy; decisions are based on first principles.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
      - [Inspiring team, especially the CEO (Marcel) and CTO (Daniel), who are domain experts but humble and AI-native.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
      - [Demanding work, as the team is building in a new space.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [**Marcel (CEO) Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Vision & Positioning:** Drives the company's narrative in the rapidly changing AI market.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [**Sales:** Closes most new deals and handles at-risk accounts, leveraging his 25+ years of experience.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - [**Setting Standards:** Builds and scales key functions (e.g., the 8-week onboarding sprint) before staffing them.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [**Product Strategy:** Guides product prioritization based on user needs, not technical details.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:** Follow up with Dan on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [**Dan:** Send any additional questions to George.](https://fathom.video/share/2r613urz1R2oatRuJgxkUy54iE47zPxf?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
